'''ngapuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodient|fodient]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodient|fodient]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngapuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæpizith|ngæpizith]] || [[word:ngæpizij|ngæpizij]] || [[word:ngæpizish|ngæpizish]] || [[word:ngæpizi|ngæpizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngapupuzuth|ngapupuzuth]] || [[word:ngapupuzuj|ngapupuzuj]] || [[word:ngapupuzush|ngapupuzush]] || [[word:ngapupuzu|ngapupuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngapuzuth|ngapuzuth]] || [[word:ngapuzuj|ngapuzuj]] || [[word:ngapuzush|ngapuzush]] || [[word:ngapuzu|ngapuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngapufzuth|ngapufzuth]] || [[word:ngapufzuj|ngapufzuj]] || [[word:ngapufzush|ngapufzush]] || [[word:ngapufzuf|ngapufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngapuzuthu|ngapuzuthu]] || [[word:ngapuzuju|ngapuzuju]] || [[word:ngapuzushu|ngapuzushu]] || [[word:ngapuzuku|ngapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngapuzuth|ngapuzuth]] || [[word:ngapuzuj|ngapuzuj]] || [[word:ngapuzush|ngapuzush]] || [[word:ngapuzu|ngapuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngapuzuthul|ngapuzuthul]] || [[word:ngapuzujul|ngapuzujul]] || [[word:ngapuzushul|ngapuzushul]] || [[word:ngapuzukul|ngapuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngapuzuthuthu|ngapuzuthuthu]] || [[word:ngapuzujuju|ngapuzujuju]] || [[word:ngapuzushushu|ngapuzushushu]] || [[word:ngapuzuku|ngapuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngapuzuthun|ngapuzuthun]] || [[word:ngapuzujun|ngapuzujun]] || [[word:ngapuzushun|ngapuzushun]] || [[word:ngapuzukun|ngapuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngapuzuthuoro|ngapuzuthuoro]] || [[word:ngapuzujuoro|ngapuzujuoro]] || [[word:ngapuzushuoro|ngapuzushuoro]] || [[word:ngapuzukuoro|ngapuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
